name: files.write
description: Write content to a file. Respects write_scope settings: 'local_only' writes to filesystem, 'pr_only' creates a PR branch, 'local_and_pr' does both. Creates parent directories if needed.

path.description: Absolute or workspace-relative path for the file (required)

content.description: Content to write to the file (required)

create_dirs.description: Create parent directories if they don't exist (default: true)

write_scope.description: Write target scope (default: inherit from project settings)

commit_message.description: Commit message for PR writes (optional, auto-generated if not provided)

pr_url.description: PR URL if write included PR target

commit_sha.description: Git commit SHA if write included PR target

error.description: Error message if success is false
